raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/scrub>XXXX XXXX XXXX I reported my Barclays XXXX XXXX card lost. XX/XX/XXXX I did not receive my USPS mail that included the new XXXX XXXXXXXX card. XX/XX/XXXX the new card was used multiple times. At XXXX I received a call alerting me to possible fraud. At that time I discovered an E-receipt from a purchase at XXXX had been sent to my email. At XXXX I called Barclays and reported the fraud. XX/XX/XXXX they sent me a letter that because the physical card had been used for that purchase, it was used by me. I was at home on a school night preparing my XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  old girls for bed. XXXX adult roommates can confirm my presence at home and my report of the problem to them at that time.
